message:
🐛 Fix Auto-QA issues: route constants, Copilot 404 handling (#4203)

- Replace hardcoded "/settings" paths with ROUTES.SETTINGS constant in
  FeatureKagent, AIActionBar, and Layout components (#4191)
- Add 404-specific hint for Copilot assignment failures and skip
  creating diagnostic issues for 404 errors (not rate-limit related) (#4195)
- Close #4193 as false positive: all import * usage is in test files only

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
